title: pentacalia favillosa
intro: Pentacalia favillosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pentacalia favillosa include reducing congestion and coughs, as well as alleviating symptoms of allergies and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
